identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.core_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

headings.usage: All H1-H3 headings, Hero text, Feature titles

body.usage: Paragraphs, UI elements, Data tables, Inputs

rules: Never use Inter for main headings.
Use tight tracking (tracking-tight) for large Playfair headings.
Use loose leading (leading-relaxed) for body text.

usage_rules: Background must be the warm cream (#F9F7F2), NOT pure white.
Text is deep chocolate brown (#3E2723), NOT black.
Primary actions use the Chocolate Brown.
Accents and highlights use the Muted Gold (#C5A059).
NO dark gradients. Use solid colors or subtle textures.

layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid cramped interfaces.
layout.container_style: Rounded corners (rounded-xl or rounded-2xl). Soft shadows (shadow-sm or shadow-md).

dashboard_structure.sidebar: Dark Chocolate (#3E2723) with Gold (#C5A059) active states.
dashboard_structure.header: Transparent or Glassmorphism (blur-md) with sticky positioning.
dashboard_structure.cards: White background, soft border (#E6DCC8), elegant padding.

buttons.secondary: border border-accent text-accent hover:bg-accent/10 rounded-full px-8

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

overrides: Radius: Use 0.75rem (12px) or 1rem (16px) for a softer, organic feel.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle grain or paper texture overlays on the background if possible to enhance the 'artisanal' feel.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React. Use thin strokes (stroke-width={1.5}) for elegance.
visual_enhancers.motion: Slow, smooth transitions. duration-500 ease-out. No bouncy spring animations.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE tailwind.config.js with the colors defined in 'colors.palette'.
3. APPLY the 'Cream' background globally in index.css (body { @apply bg-background text-foreground }).
4. CUSTOMIZE Shadcn components to match the 'rounded-xl' and 'border-gold' aesthetic.
5. USE the provided image URLs for placeholders.
6. ENSURE all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
7. DO NOT use default Shadcn slate/zinc colors. Replace them with the Warm Brown/Cream palette.
universal_guidelines: No center-aligned layouts unless for specific hero balance.
Ensure accessibility (contrast ratios) for the Gold/Cream combinations.
